# RumooEV — Electric Mobility. Endless Possibilities.

RumooEV is a pan-India Enterprise EV Fleet Lease-to-Own platform. RumooEV is not an EV manufacturer — it is a fleet partner that buys electric delivery scooters, deploys them to businesses, and manages the entire fleet for one predictable monthly cost.

## Business model

RumooEV runs two business lines.

### B2B — Enterprise fleet leasing (primary)

Businesses lease electric delivery scooters (models: Rumoo HS and Rumoo Lite) on a 24-month Lease-to-Own plan. One fixed monthly cost per scooter covers the vehicle plus comprehensive insurance, preventive maintenance, 24/7 breakdown support, replacement vehicles, a fleet support team, and a dedicated account manager. After 24 months, 100% ownership of every scooter transfers to the business at no additional cost — the fleet becomes a company-owned asset. This ownership transfer is the core differentiator.

Minimum fleet size is 50 scooters (50–99 is a custom quote); published per-scooter pricing tiers start at 100 scooters and range from ₹5,500/month (100–249 scooters) down to ₹4,500/month (5,000+ scooters). GST is extra, and battery swapping is optional and billed separately. Fleets are typically deployed in 15–20 days, and RumooEV commits to 95% fleet uptime with replacement vehicles within 24–48 hours.

### B2C — Rider rentals (secondary)

Individual delivery and gig riders rent the Rumoo Ultra on daily plans from ₹260/day, with battery swapping, maintenance, and breakdown support included.

## Target industries

Quick commerce, food delivery, logistics and courier, e-commerce, and corporate/campus operations that run last-mile delivery.

## The fleet

Three models — Rumoo Lite and Rumoo HS (business fleets) and Rumoo Ultra (riders) — share one published spec sheet: 40 km/h top speed, 80–100 km range, 1.8 kWh swappable lithium-ion battery, 180 kg loading capacity, 70 kg vehicle weight, tubeless tyres, anti-theft alarm, keyless entry, USB charging, and a digital display.

## Presence

Offices in Gujarat (registered office & operations) and Telangana (operations hub, Hyderabad), with deployments and service support pan-India.

## Contact
